Kadir Has University

Faculty of Economics, Administrative and Social Sciences

Kadir Has University Faculty of Economics, Administrative and Social Sciences offers students the opportunity to study in various fields such as economics, business, psychology, political science, international trade, and management information systems. The faculty stands out with an educational approach that prioritizes academic success, research, and the professional development of students. Additionally, it aims to help students secure a place in the global business world by providing various research centers and career opportunities.
